problem id: a37158d6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  00011110 -> 01000100
  11010010 -> 11101111
  00010000 -> 11011011
  11010111 -> 10100101
  10001101 -> 10000111
  00011010 -> 01001101
  00000010 -> 01111011
  11011011 -> 10111111
  01000111 -> 10100000

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 00001010
